apply_patch_tool: apply a unified diff patch to one or more files in the working directory
parse_patch: parse a unified diff format string into FilePatch objects with hunks
apply_hunks: apply parsed patch hunks to original file content lines in reverse order
create_new_file_from_patch: create a new file from patch content when the old path is /dev/null
delete_file_from_patch: delete a file from the filesystem when the new path is /dev/null in the patch
